mods.name: High-Flow Air Filter
mods.description: Drop-in performance filter for the factory airbox. A simple upgrade that ensures the supercharged 5.2L Predator engine breathes freely.
mods.installNotes: Open factory airbox, swap filter. No tools required. Reoil every 25,000 miles. 5 minute job.

mods.name: Catback Exhaust
mods.description: The GT500's supercharged V8 deserves to be heard. An aftermarket catback adds volume and aggression while improving exhaust flow.
mods.installNotes: Bolt-on replacement from the rear of the active valve mid-pipe. Retains factory active exhaust valve functionality. No cutting. 1 hour on jack stands.

mods.name: Lowering Springs
mods.description: Lower the GT500 by 20–25mm for improved aerodynamics and handling. The factory MagneRide adaptive dampers remain fully functional.
mods.installNotes: MagneRide-compatible springs required. Standard springs will damage the adaptive dampers. Spring compressor needed. Alignment after install. 2 hour job.

mods.name: Supercharger Pulley Swap
mods.description: A smaller supercharger pulley increases boost pressure for significant power gains. The Predator engine responds extremely well to more boost.
mods.partNumbers: Lethal Performance LP-GT500-PK, VMP Performance VMP-24-10-0600
mods.installNotes: Remove factory supercharger pulley with a puller tool. Press on smaller pulley. Must retune for increased boost. Add 2–3 psi of boost. Gains 50–80hp with tune. 2 hour job.

mods.name: Heat Exchanger Upgrade
mods.description: The factory supercharger heat exchanger struggles to keep intake temps down in hot weather. An upgraded unit maintains consistent power output.
mods.partNumbers: VMP Performance VMP-24-10-0200, Lethal Performance dual-pass
mods.installNotes: Drain coolant from the supercharger cooling circuit. Swap the heat exchanger behind the front bumper. Refill with 50/50 coolant mix. 2–3 hour install. Critical for track use.

mods.name: ECU Calibration
mods.description: A custom ECU tune optimizes the Predator engine's fueling, timing, and boost curve for maximum power with supporting mods.
mods.partNumbers: Lund Racing Custom Tune, Palm Beach Dyno Remote Tune
mods.installNotes: Flash via SCT or HP Tuners device. Custom tune from a GT500-specialized tuner is strongly recommended over off-the-shelf maps. Requires datalogging and 2–3 revision cycles.

mods.name: Carbon Fiber Driveshaft
mods.description: A carbon fiber driveshaft reduces rotating mass for quicker revving and slightly improved acceleration. Also handles higher power levels than the stock aluminum unit.
mods.partNumbers: Carbon Fiber Shaft, The Driveshaft Shop FDSH30-C
mods.installNotes: Support the transmission and unbolt the factory driveshaft at both ends. Install new shaft with factory bolts. Torque to spec. Professional install recommended due to vehicle weight.

mods.name: Drag Pack Setup
mods.description: Convert the GT500 for drag strip duty with drag radials, a line lock, and suspension adjustments for maximum straight-line traction.
mods.partNumbers: Mickey Thompson ET Street SS 305/35R20, BMR Drag Kit TCA064
mods.installNotes: Install drag radials on rear. Lower front springs for weight transfer. Stiffen rear suspension to plant the rear. Enable factory line lock via FORScan. Practice launches at 3500 RPM.
